A '''four-eyed Jedi Master''' served on the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Assembly]] of great Masters of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] around the time of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Along with [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]], [[Thon]], [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]], and [[Ood Bnar]], the four-eyed being spoke with [[Nomi Sunrider]], [[Qrrrl Toq]], [[Cay Qel-Droma]] and [[Dace Diath]] before their mission to [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] {{1st}}
